title: urtica dioica subsp. eudioica
intro: Urtica dioica subsp. eudioica, commonly known as wild burdock or burdock, is a subspecies of the burdock plant, which is a biennial plant in the dandelion family with large leaves and a tall stem bearing small flowers. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Urtica dioica subsp. eudioica include its ability to support digestive health, lower cholesterol levels, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Urtica dioica subsp. eudioica include teas, tinctures, capsules, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its numerous health benefits.
